name: Producer Pal
description: AI music production assistant for Ableton Live. Generate and edit MIDI clips, control playback, manage tracks, scenes, and the arrangement.
long_description:
To use: Add the Producer Pal device (Producer_Pal.amxd) to an empty MIDI track in Ableton Live. Ask Claude Desktop (with this extension enabled): "connect to ableton".
Requires Ableton Live 12.3+ with Max for Live (e.g. Ableton Live Suite).

tools.name: Connect
tools.description: Connect to Ableton Live and initialize Producer Pal. Call before other ppal-* tools when the user says use/connect to ableton.

tools.name: Context
tools.description: Read/write project memory or search configured sample folder for audio files.

tools.name: Read Live Set
tools.description: Read Live Set global settings, track/scene overview. Returns overview by default. Use include to add detail.

tools.name: Update Live Set
tools.description: Update Live Set global settings or manage locators.

tools.name: Read Track
tools.description: Read track settings, clips, and devices. Returns overview by default. Use include to add detail.

tools.name: Create Track
tools.description: Create track(s).

tools.name: Update Track
tools.description: Update track(s).

tools.name: Read Scene
tools.description: Read scene settings and clips. Returns overview by default. Use include to add detail.

tools.name: Create Scene
tools.description: Create empty scene(s) or capture playing session clips.

tools.name: Update Scene
tools.description: Update scene(s).

tools.name: Read Clip
tools.description: Read clip settings, MIDI notes, and audio properties. Returns overview by default. Use include to add detail.

tools.name: Create Clip
tools.description: Create MIDI or audio clip(s). Requires slot (session) and/or trackIndex + arrangementStart (arrangement). For audio: use sampleFile (absolute path), otherwise omit sampleFile to create a MIDI clip.

tools.name: Update Clip
tools.description: Update clip(s), MIDI notes, and warp settings (audio clips).

tools.name: Read Device
tools.description: Read information about a device, chain, or drum pad by ID or path. Returns overview by default. Use include to add detail.

tools.name: Create Device
tools.description: Create a native Live device (instrument, MIDI effect, or audio effect) on a track or inside a chain.

tools.name: Update Device
tools.description: Update device(s), chain(s), or drum pad(s).

tools.name: Delete
tools.description: Delete objects. Supports tracks, scenes, clips, devices, and drum pads. Use ids for most types; path for devices/drum pads.

tools.name: Duplicate
tools.description: Duplicate an object. Supports tracks, scenes, clips, and devices. Use count for multiple track/scene copies; arrangementStart, locator, or toSlot for clip placement.

tools.name: Select
tools.description: Navigate to and select items in Live. Use for "show me", "go to", "open" requests. No args: read current state.

tools.name: Playback
tools.description: Control playback of the arrangement and session scenes/clips.

mcp_server_origin.title: Ableton device URL
mcp_server_origin.description: URL for connecting to the Producer Pal Max for Live device (protocol://host:port). Use http://localhost:[port] for local connections or http://[IP]:[port] for network connections. The port number must match the port in the Max for Live device's advanced settings (default port is 3350). Restart this extension after changing the URL. Default: http://localhost:3350
